promo_codes.description: Save 20% on stays with a pre-discount total between $200 and $250.
10% off for long stays with a minimum total of $1000.
15% off serviced apartment bookings between $300 and $1500.

properties.name: Paris Central Riverview Hotel
properties.description: Riverside boutique hotel in the historic heart of Paris, a short walk from Notre-Dame. Popular with couples for its views and daily breakfast buffet.

properties.name: Paris Budget Inn Gare du Nord
properties.description: Simple, budget-friendly hotel within walking distance of Gare du Nord. Basic rooms and easy metro access.

properties.name: Palais Lumière Paris
properties.description: Iconic five-star palace hotel with spa, indoor pool, gourmet dining, and views over the Opéra district.

properties.name: Midtown Studio & Suites
properties.description: Modern serviced apartments in Midtown Manhattan with full kitchens, desks, and fast WiFi. Ideal for workations and longer stays.

properties.name: Downtown Serviced Lofts
properties.description: Stylish loft-style serviced apartments near Wall Street, featuring fully equipped kitchens and in-unit laundry.

properties.name: Orlando Family Resort Lake Buena Vista
properties.description: Family-focused resort with outdoor pools, waterslides, kids’ club, and complimentary hot breakfast minutes from major theme parks.

properties.name: Orlando Airport Budget Inn
properties.description: No-frills motel-style property near Orlando International Airport with free shuttle and outdoor pool.

properties.name: Riverside Suites Singapore
properties.description: Serviced apartments along the Singapore River featuring full kitchens, in-unit washer-dryers, and easy MRT access.

properties.name: Orchard Business Hotel
properties.description: High-rise business hotel in the Orchard area with meeting facilities, rooftop pool, and on-site dining.

properties.name: London Tonight Budget Hotel
properties.description: Central London budget hotel ideal for same-day bookings, offering compact rooms, free WiFi, and flexible pay-at-property options.

properties.name: Thames View Business Hotel
properties.description: Modern riverfront hotel with spacious rooms, conference facilities, and a popular bar overlooking the Thames.

properties.name: Berlin Mitte City Hotel
properties.description: Well-rated midscale hotel in Mitte offering free WiFi, daily breakfast, and easy access to Berlin’s main sights.

properties.name: Mitte Design & Spa Hotel
properties.description: Contemporary design hotel in central Berlin featuring a small spa area, bar, and generous breakfast buffet.

properties.name: Roma Centro Classic Hotel
properties.description: Classic Rome hotel set in a historic building near Piazza Venezia, with comfortable rooms and optional breakfast.

properties.name: Trastevere Budget Guesthouse
properties.addressLine1: Via di San Francesco a Ripa 52
properties.description: Simple guesthouse in lively Trastevere with basic rooms and shared kitchen facilities.

properties.name: Tokyo Station Business Hotel
properties.description: Business-friendly hotel steps from Tokyo Station offering non-smoking rooms, work desks, and high-speed WiFi.

properties.name: Shinjuku Economy Hotel
properties.description: Budget-friendly hotel in vibrant Shinjuku with compact rooms and free WiFi.

properties.name: Barcelona Centro Pet-Friendly Hotel
properties.description: Central Barcelona hotel near La Rambla offering pet-friendly rooms, on-site parking, and complimentary breakfast.

properties.name: Barcelona Beachfront Hotel
properties.description: Beachfront hotel with sea-view rooms, rooftop pool, and underground parking, a short taxi ride from the Gothic Quarter.
